subject: Re: FSC curve issue with M
body:
+ I used binary mask created from M

2024년 7월 25일 (목) 오전 11:51, Mingyu Jung <jmg0910@snu.ac.kr>님이 작성:

> Hi
>
> I have some issues with M. When I refined my particles with M, the FSC
> curve didn't go under specific value. But in relion, there is no issue with
> my FSC curve. One more weird thing is the box size from M is different from
> my input half map(160 -> 204).
> I posted 2 FSC curve. The normal one is from relion and weird one is from
> M. My pipeline was Warp-relion4.0-M. Anyone knows the causes of issues?
>
> Best,
> Mingyu
>
